extract: Darkest Lariat (Japanese: ＤＤラリアット DD Lariat) is a damage-dealing Dark-type move introduced in Generation VII. In Generation VII and Generation IX, it is the signature move of Incineroar. It was TR93 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. It can be upgraded to the special Z-Move Malicious Moonsault by Incineroar holding Incinium Z.
